en: Ah, the proud crown of the drunkards of Ephraim, and the fading flower of its glorious beauty, which is on the head of the rich valley of those overcome with wine!
zh: 以法蓮那些醉漢所戴的高傲冠冕，有禍了！ 它在肥美谷山頂上的榮美，有禍了！ 它必如將殘的花朵， 滿了喝醉酒的人。

en: Behold, the Lord has one who is mighty and strong; like a storm of hail, a destroying tempest, like a storm of mighty, overflowing waters, he casts down to the earth with his hand.
zh: 看哪！主有一個大能大力的人， 像一陣冰雹、一陣毀滅的暴風， 像漲溢猛流的大水， 他必用手把它摔落地上。

en: The proud crown of the drunkards of Ephraim will be trodden underfoot;
zh: 以法蓮的醉漢所戴的高傲冠冕，必被踐踏在腳下。

en: and the fading flower of its glorious beauty, which is on the head of the rich valley, will be like a first-ripe fig before the summer: when someone sees it, he swallows it as soon as it is in his hand.
zh: 它在肥美谷山頂上如將殘的花朵一般的榮美， 必像夏天以前初熟的無花果。 那些看見它的人，都必注意； 一到手裡， 就把它吞吃了。

en: In that day the LORD of hosts will be a crown of glory, and a diadem of beauty, to the remnant of his people,
zh: 到那日， 萬軍之耶和華必作他餘民榮耀的冠冕、美麗的華冠，

en: and a spirit of justice to him who sits in judgment, and strength to those who turn back the battle at the gate.
zh: 也必作在位上施行審判者公平的心靈， 並作在城門口擊退敵人者的力量。

en: These also reel with wine and stagger with strong drink; the priest and the prophet reel with strong drink, they are swallowed by wine, they stagger with strong drink, they reel in vision, they stumble in giving judgment.
zh: 就是這地的人，也因酒搖晃不定， 因濃酒東倒西歪； 祭司和先知都因濃酒搖晃不定， 被酒弄至昏亂，因濃酒東倒西歪。 他們見異象的時候，搖晃不定， 他們判斷的時候，也顛顛倒倒。

en: For all tables are full of filthy vomit, with no space left.
zh: 因為各席上都滿了污穢的嘔吐，沒有一處是乾淨的。

en: "To whom will he teach knowledge, and to whom will he explain the message? Those who are weaned from the milk, those taken from the breast?
zh: 他們說： “他要把知識教導誰呢？ 要使誰明白他所傳的信息呢？ 是那些剛斷奶， 剛離開母懷的嗎？

en: For it is precept upon precept, precept upon precept, line upon line, line upon line, here a little, there a little."
zh: 因為他所說的， 只是些重複又重複的話， 和毫無意義的字母， 這裡一點，那裡一點罷了。”

en: For by people of strange lips and with a foreign tongue the LORD will speak to this people,
zh: 耶和華要藉著外族人的嘴唇和外族人的舌頭， 對這人民說話。

en: to whom he has said, "This is rest; give rest to the weary; and this is repose"; yet they would not hear.
zh: 他曾對他們說：“這就是安息之處，你們若使疲乏的人得安息，就必得著這安歇的地方。” 但他們不肯聽從。

en: And the word of the LORD will be to them precept upon precept, precept upon precept, line upon line, line upon line, here a little, there a little, that they may go, and fall backward, and be broken, and snared, and taken.
zh: 所以耶和華對他們所說的話， 就成了重複又重複的話， 和毫無意義的字母， 這裡一點，那裡一點， 以致他們雖然往前走，卻必仰面跌倒，並且跌傷，陷入網羅被纏住。

en: Therefore hear the word of the LORD, you scoffers, who rule this people in Jerusalem!
zh: 因此好譏笑人的人哪！ 就是管轄這些在耶路撒冷的人民的， 你們要聽耶和華的話。

en: Because you have said, "We have made a covenant with death, and with Sheol we have an agreement, when the overwhelming whip passes through it will not come to us, for we have made lies our refuge, and in falsehood we have taken shelter";
zh: 因為你們曾說：“我們與死亡立了約， 與陰間結了盟； 刑罰的鞭子掃過的時候，必不會碰到我們， 因為我們以謊言作遮蔽，以虛假作庇護。”

en: therefore thus says the Lord GOD, "Behold, I am the one who has laid as a foundation in Zion, a stone, a tested stone, a precious cornerstone, of a sure foundation: 'Whoever believes will not be in haste.'
zh: 所以主耶和華這樣說： “看哪！我在錫安放置一塊石頭， 是試驗過的石頭， 是穩固的基石，寶貴的房角石； 信靠的人，必不著急。

en: And I will make justice the line, and righteousness the plumb line; and hail will sweep away the refuge of lies, and waters will overwhelm the shelter."
zh: 我要以公平為準繩， 以公義為線鉈； 冰雹必把謊言的遮蔽沖去， 大水必漫過庇護所。”

en: Then your covenant with death will be annulled, and your agreement with Sheol will not stand; when the overwhelming scourge passes through, you will be beaten down by it.
zh: 你們與死亡所立的約要廢除， 你們與陰間所結的盟必立不住； 刑罰的鞭子掃過的時候， 你們就必被踐踏。

en: As often as it passes through it will take you; for morning by morning it will pass through, by day and by night; and it will be sheer terror to understand the message.
zh: 每次掃過的時候，都把你們抓去； 因為每早晨它必漫過，白天與黑夜也是這樣； 人若明白所傳的，必受驚恐。

en: For the bed is too short to stretch oneself on, and the covering too narrow to wrap oneself in.
zh: 床鋪太短，人就不能伸直， 被窩太窄，就蓋不住全身。

en: For the LORD will rise up as on Mount Perazim; as in the Valley of Gibeon he will be roused; to do his deed- strange is his deed! and to work his work- alien is his work!
zh: 耶和華必像在毘拉心山一樣興起， 又像在基遍谷一樣發怒， 為要作成他的工，他那奇妙的工， 好成就他的事，就是奇異的事。

en: Now therefore do not scoff, lest your bonds be made strong; for I have heard a decree of destruction from the Lord GOD of hosts against the whole land.
zh: 現在，你們不可再譏笑了， 免得捆綁你們的繩索綁得更緊， 因為我從主萬軍之耶和華那裡聽到， 決定要在全地上施行毀滅的事。

en: Give ear, and hear my voice; give attention, and hear my speech.
zh: 你們要側耳聽我的聲音， 留心聽我的話。

en: Does he who plows for sowing plow continually? does he continually open and harrow his ground?
zh: 農夫怎會不斷耕犁來撒種呢？ 他怎會常常開墾耕地呢？

en: When he has leveled its surface, does he not scatter dill, sow cumin, and put in wheat in rows and barley in its proper place, and emmer as the border?
zh: 他犁平了地面， 不就撒種小茴香，播種大茴香， 按行列種小麥， 在指定的地方種大麥，在田邊種粗麥嗎？

en: For he is rightly instructed; his God teaches him.
zh: 因為他的 神教導他，指教他正確的方法。

en: Dill is not threshed with a threshing sledge, nor is a cart wheel rolled over cumin, but dill is beaten out with a stick, and cumin with a rod.
zh: 打小茴香是不用尖耙的， 軋大茴香也不用碾輪； 而是用杖打小茴香，用棍打大茴香。

en: Does one crush grain for bread? No, he does not thresh it forever; when he drives his cart wheel over it with his horses, he does not crush it.
zh: 做餅的穀粒怎麼要碾碎的呢？ 從來沒有人碾碎它們， 雖然他讓車輪和馬匹輥過穀粒， 卻不會把他們碾碎。

en: This also comes from the LORD of hosts; he is wonderful in counsel and excellent in wisdom.
zh: 這也是出於萬軍之耶和華， 他的謀略奇妙，他的智慧廣大。
